titleStmt.title: Draft of Manifesto From the Governments of Argentina, of Brazil, of Chile and of Peru to the Governments of Bolivia and of Paraguay, and to the Commission of Neutrals in Washington

head.hi: Draft of Manifesto From the Governments of Argentina, of Brazil, of Chile and of Peru to the Governments of Bolivia and of Paraguay, and to the Commission of Neutrals in Washington
head.note: A notation at the top of the page reads: “Dated about July 29, 1932.” See telegram No. 55, July 29, 7 p.m., to the Chargé in Brazil, p. 152, and telegram No. 111, July 29, 8 p.m., from the Ambassador in Peru, p. 153.
